hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *_apps/*.md|*_layouts/*.html) BUNDLE_GEMFILE=/mnt/c/00_Claude_Code/00a_HomePage/Gemfile RUBYOPT="-rbundler/setup" ./vendor/bundle/ruby/3.2.0/bin/jekyll build 2>&1 | tail -5;; esac; }
hooks.statusMessage: Jekyll build (Liquidテンプレート検証)
